channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Yahoo Finance aims to create a Bloomberg Terminal for the masses
item.description: The internet giant launches AlphaSpace, a customizable dashboard bringing Wall Street tools to 150 million everyday investors.

item.title: State funding increasingly drives DeepSeek and China's AI growth
item.description: Government-backed AI investments in China rose from under 10 deals annually before 2018 to over 140 in 2025, shifting control.

item.title: Parag Agrawal's AI startup plans to pay publishers for AI agent use
item.description: The former Twitter CEO's company launches Index, a platform to measure how much content owners contribute to AI tasks.

item.title: Study of 6,000 executives reveals why 70% of transformations fail
item.description: The issue is not strategy or funding but a cognitive bias known as the false consensus effect.
